details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more

about_item: 👍Great Carrier Measures:17.5” L x 11” W x 11” H,Recommended Max load of 15 lbs pets.Please do not choose your carrier based on weight--please reference your pet's length and height in selecting a carrier size.
👍wWell Fits for under-seat dimensions of most airlines.Every airline has a specific set of rules and regulations,please contact with airline before flying with your pet.

👍Mesh windows for ventilation, top and side entry with locking zippers for safety. Carrying handles, adjustable shoulder strap which can also be used as seatbelt, and back strap can fasten the carrier to your luggage.

👍The pet carrier comes with a removable solid base insert,which creates a solid surface for your pet to stand on, along with a removable & hand washable cozy fleece pet bed, which offers a cozy sleeping space for your traveling pet.

👍AIRLINE APPROVED CARRIER - With airline-approved design,you can take your pet to go to everywhere. This pet carrier provides two connecting loop handles for balanced carrying as a dual seat belt or luggage strap to secure transport

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality, sturdy, and comfortable for travel, with plenty of room for pets to move around. They appreciate its value for money and suitability for various animals, with one customer noting it works well for trips to the vet. The zipper quality receives mixed feedback, with several customers reporting that the zippers come apart.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be of good quality, with one customer noting it's better than older hard types.

examples.snippet: ...They love to climb on top of it. Good Quality. We choose two of these carriers because they fold down & can be put away when we’re done with them.
Great quality. My cat even jumps in to sleep when at home. Traveled from Ohio to Florida and back many times and this has worked great for my chonk!
...The inside pad come off and is machine washable and dryer friendly. Great carrier at a great prices!
I am very pleased with this carrier! It is very sturdy and well made. I would definitely recommend this product! Love it!

insights.title: Size
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the carrier's size, finding it big enough for their cats to move around comfortably and with lots of room to lay down.

examples.snippet: I liked this carrier because it was roomy, easy access on the top and side. It included shoulder straps, looks great, has a peppermint soft color....
I love the color, it seems very durable. Perfect size and a great value. Plenty of ventilation. Very happy with it. Would recommend
Easy to carry, nice size/plenty of room, 3 different options to open/close (both ends & top), nice & airy with mesh all around - my cat loves it....
fits a pretty decent sized cat

insights.title: Sturdiness
insights.summary: Customers find the carrier sturdy, with one mentioning it holds its shape well and another noting it has no bending issues.

examples.snippet: Easy to use. Strong and durable
...These are for my two cats and they are sturdy carriers. Pretty color green.
...Got this one! I do like the sturdiness and how easy it was to use, and it was SUPER comfortable when I carried it around....
It's ok for small cats but not sturdy. If your cat weighs 15 or more pounds get another large one because that's what I'm going to have to do.

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier to be good value for money, offering great quality for the price.

examples.snippet: I love the color, it seems very durable. Perfect size and a great value. Plenty of ventilation. Very happy with it. Would recommend
Great price, great quality. I was pleasantly surprised by it.
It is worth the money HOWEVER if you have an escape artist like me then beware of the zippers!...
...Easy to clean and affordable!

insights.title: Suitability
insights.summary: Customers find the carrier suitable for pets, with several mentioning it works well for small cats, and one customer noting it's perfect for their Shorkie puppy.

examples.snippet: Perfect for transporting my cat to the vet. Folds up flat for storage !
great carrier for cats or small dogs. It folds down for easy storage. My cat loves it so much she sleeps in it at night....
Lightweight, perfect for a kitten
This was perfect for my 2 cats to share for a vet visit. It has at funky smell upon opening so definitely air it out before using....

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the pet carrier comfortable, particularly for dogs during travel, with one customer noting it's cozy enough for even larger cats.

examples.snippet: Perfect for adult cats. Sturdy and comfortable. I will buy another or two. Have recommended to all our cat owning friends
Comfortable for my cat, he didnt seem to mind it at all. Easy to carry, especially since it has the longer strap to put over your shoulder....
It is nice and comfortable for your pet and they can stay warm.
...i think its a little better since she feels comforted. i cant speak on cats who like to break out of things, but the mesh is strong....

insights.title: Functionality
insights.summary: Customers find that the pet carrier works well, particularly for cats, with one customer mentioning it's effective for transporting kittens and another noting it's suitable for larger animals.

examples.snippet: Perfect size and works great
Works well!
This is a great cat carrier for the price! It would also work for a very small dog. The soft padded removable bottom is great....
...Very basic but worked just fine for my puppy!

insights.title: Zipper quality
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the carrier's zippers, with some appreciating the multiple access portals while others report issues with them coming apart and not closing tightly.

examples.snippet: ...It's sturdy and the zippers are nice I haven't had any problem with it. Like the color too.
Roomy but not made good. Zipper separated and the leash inside to hold dog in , the material was made were a dog can chewy it....
...It's great for training, because you can unzip both ends and train the cat to go through it like a tunnel....
...Super functional, large pocket on the side, easy to zip, plenty of ventilation for my pet....

authors_reviews.title: Great little cat carrier, folds up easily for storage
authors_reviews.text: This is a great cat carrier for the price! It would also work for a very small dog. The soft padded removable bottom is great. And the carrier can be opened from the top, or either end, whichever works best for you. My cat seemed calm and comfortable. You can remove the bottom for easy cleaning, and it folds up easily for easy storage.
authors_reviews.author: David Lukens

authors_reviews.title: Good quality, affordable.
authors_reviews.text: Roomy, sturdy, good ventilation and options for more or less visibility for Kitty. Especially like the stuff board covered by soft material as the base/floor of the carrier. I like its foldability. No assembly. I do like some features on the more expensive ones, but we only use the carrier for vet visits a few times a year. Needed to get something affordable and this is it.Great choice.
authors_reviews.author: Peggy Faletti

authors_reviews.title: Kitty likes it
authors_reviews.text: Very nice pet carrier my cat has no problem with it at all since he can see what's going on from inside. It's sturdy and the zippers are nice I haven't had any problem with it. Like the color too.
authors_reviews.author: Renee

authors_reviews.title: Good quality, smart design
authors_reviews.text: These carriers are amazing and the quality is really great for the price. I have a bunch of bearded dragons and they are perfect! I literally have 8 of these carriers. They’re perfect for any small animal you want to check on and have good view and access to often :)
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Good Carrier
authors_reviews.text: Perfect for bigger cats. My cat is 18_20 lbs and fits comfortably. It was simple to put together. Only reason it's not a 5 is because the zippers are a little wonky. It works once you can get it right. Very easy to carry.
authors_reviews.author: A.

authors_reviews.title: Buy It!💗💗
authors_reviews.text: I absolutely love this carrier. More importantly, our kitten is good with it. He is almost 8 pounds and fits in it comfortably. I highly recommend it. We got the green and it’s just lovely.
authors_reviews.author: None

authors_reviews.title: My cat loves her pink case!
authors_reviews.text: It’s roomie and comfortable, my cat has been hanging out inside of it even when we don’t need to take her anywhere!
authors_reviews.author: Lynn M

authors_reviews.title: Cat carrier
authors_reviews.text: Very nicely made and I love the color..Thank you
authors_reviews.author: Alien Hubbard
